purpose: Convergent technical roadmap for Formation Medium work. This is an execution queue and scope-control artifact, not a pitch deck, not source-extracted, and not a proof.
operating_rule: Advance only work that improves source completeness, formal/checker support, physical-regime triage, or non-promotion discipline. Do not expand into broad substrate speculation without a registered intake/check target. Before major work, apply the mission-grade critical review doctrine: identify the hard bottleneck, thin-stick dependencies, negative-progress risk, and whether the work is convenience drift.

resource_tiers.budget_profile: current local repo and lightweight scripts
small contractor/advisor budget or limited cloud compute
unlock: targeted source intake by domain specialists

near_term_queue.title: Keep Formation Medium status language synchronized with check results
near_term_queue.exit_condition: No stale SOURCE_GAP/NOT_IMPLEMENTED language remains for already implemented source-coverage guards.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Status synchronization is not theorem progress.

near_term_queue.title: Strengthen machine-readable FM1 constraint schema and validator
near_term_queue.exit_condition: Every FM1 constraint has slot, status, source leads, check targets or blockers, failure mode, and non-promotion boundary.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: FM1 schema validation does not make FM1 physics-checked.

near_term_queue.title: Move surfaceology finite fixtures from polygon chords toward source-faithful surface curve data
near_term_queue.exit_condition: Convex-polygon chord fixture check covers n=4..7 with 30 chords, 56 crossing edges, and 63 maximal-noncrossing witnesses; next exit is source-faithful surface curve data beyond polygon-chord abstraction.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Polygon chord fixtures are not a surfaceology theorem, not full source-faithful surface curve enumeration, and not a positive-region solver.

near_term_queue.title: Plan bounded SMT/typed-predicate model for cosmohedron R12/R13
near_term_queue.exit_condition: A bounded delta-domain/equality-layer fixture plan exists with explicit domain assumptions and expected counterexample policy.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: A fixture plan is not an SMT proof or theorem.

near_term_queue.title: Execute narrow source-intake reviews for high-resonance or scattering-native tracks
near_term_queue.exit_condition: source-intake framed PRI-001 high-resonance source-candidate queue exists with four candidate classes and eleven DOI-backed external candidates; next exit is one narrow PG1-PG8 source review for HR-C3 persistent support/channel identity or HR-C1 boundary/resonant readout, without flattening roles.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: PRI-001 source-intake candidate queue is not source ingestion, source extraction, high-resonance validation, substrate selection, CRBSM validation, Route A implementation, or winner declaration, and must preserve role separation without flattening.

near_term_queue.title: Assemble an early technical diligence packet from repo evidence
near_term_queue.exit_condition: A concise packet says what is proven, checked, source-covered, open, and capital/resource-dependent.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Diligence packet is not a pitch claiming engineering readiness.

capital_dependent_queue.purpose: Review source-extracted claims and physical-regime triage for correctness and omissions.
Convert selected source-coverage guards into bounded formal checks or theorem skeletons.
Evaluate candidate physical regimes after source and formal constraints are stable enough to avoid overclaiming.

do_not_do_yet: expand into broad metaphysics without repo check targets
treat source coverage as theorem status
continue major work without mission-grade critical review prework
success_definition_for_current_phase: A clean repo-backed technical spine that can support disciplined diligence conversations while honestly marking theorem, physics, substrate, and engineering gaps.
